A JavaScript test script that verifies a loop increments a variable to 10.

# Purpose
This code is a simple script that demonstrates the use of a `for` loop in JavaScript. The loop initializes a variable `i` to 0 and increments it by 2 in each iteration until `i` is less than 10. After the loop completes, an `assert` statement checks that the value of `i` is equal to 10. This script provides narrow functionality, primarily serving as an example of loop control and assertion in JavaScript.
